section.div: Local-first healthcare AI: clinical NER & HIPAA PII de-identification that runs 100% on-device. 1,000+ medical models, 12 languages, Apple MLX + Python, no cloud, no patient data leaving your network. Apache-2.0
Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"
Software Internship Guide for Egyptian Undergraduates

Welcome to our project! Our goal is to develop a robust solution for brain tumor classification using deep learning techniques. By leveraging convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and state-of-the-art image processing methods, we aim to accurately classify brain tumor images into distinct categories such as glioma, meningioma, and pituitary tumors.
